brand.name: PricePilot
home.title: Pricing and financial decisions, explained clearly.
home.subtitle: PricePilot helps model prices, compare strategies, assess risk, and present explainable recommendations for e-commerce products in a clean browser-based workflow.
home.feature1.title: Multi-Strategy Pricing
home.feature1.description: Compare cost-plus, competitive, demand-based, inventory-based, target-margin, and optimized pricing.
home.feature2.title: Financial KPI Engine
home.feature2.description: Evaluate revenue, profit, margin, ROI, break-even units, and risk signals in one analysis flow.
home.feature3.title: Scenario Planning
home.feature3.description: See how LOW, NORMAL, HIGH, and PROMO market conditions affect recommendations before choosing a price.
analyze.title: Product pricing analysis
analyze.subtitle: Enter product and market data to compare pricing strategies, evaluate financial KPIs, and review an explainable recommendation.
analyze.results_subtitle: The interface updates through the Flask API and shows the current recommendation set.
analyze.why_recommended_caption: Simple business reasoning behind the current recommendation
analyze.empty_recommendation_reason: Run the analysis to see the recommendation rationale.
analyze.empty_recommendation: Run the analysis to generate a recommendation.
analyze.strategy_comparison_caption: Balanced ranking across profit, margin, ROI, and risk
api.error.invalid_payload: Invalid request data. Please refresh the page and try again.
api.error.unexpected_analysis: The analysis could not be completed. Please review the inputs and try again.
api.error.unexpected_scenario_compare: The scenario comparison could not be completed. Please review the inputs and try again.
portfolio.title: Multi-product pricing workspace
portfolio.subtitle: Manage a small product portfolio, compare recommended decisions across products, and review saved analysis history in one local workspace.
portfolio.summary.total_products_note: Products currently tracked in the local workspace.
portfolio.summary.projected_revenue_note: Combined expected revenue from current recommendations.
portfolio.summary.projected_profit_note: Combined expected profit from current recommendations.
portfolio.summary.low_risk_products_note: Products currently rated with low execution risk.
portfolio.form.subtitle: Use the same analysis inputs to maintain a simple but realistic local portfolio for defense and comparison.
portfolio.list.title: Portfolio Product List
portfolio.list.subtitle: Each record can be reopened in the analyzer or updated directly here.
portfolio.list.empty: No products are saved yet. Add a product to start building the portfolio workspace.
portfolio.messages.not_found: The selected product could not be found.
portfolio.messages.delete_confirm: Delete this product from the portfolio?
portfolio.comparison.title: Portfolio Comparison
portfolio.comparison.subtitle: This table compares the best current recommendation for each saved product.
portfolio.comparison.empty: Comparison data will appear here after products are added.
portfolio.history.title: Saved Analysis History
portfolio.history.subtitle: Every manual analysis stores a compact local record for later review and export.
portfolio.history.empty: No analyses have been saved yet. Run a product analysis to create history.
dashboard.title: Decision support dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: PricePilot combines pricing logic, scenario analysis, optimization, and explainable output in one academic demonstration interface.
dashboard.module1.label: Pricing Engine
dashboard.module1.title: 6 strategy models
dashboard.module1.description: Cost-plus, market, demand, inventory, target margin, and optimization-based recommendation.
dashboard.module2.label: Financial KPIs
dashboard.module2.title: 11 core indicators
dashboard.module2.description: Revenue, profit, margin, ROI, break-even, contribution margin, demand, and risk tracking.
dashboard.module3.label: Scenario Models
dashboard.module3.title: 4 market states
dashboard.module3.description: LOW, NORMAL, HIGH, and PROMO adjust demand, competitor pressure, cost, and return dynamics.
dashboard.module4.label: Explainability
dashboard.module4.title: Readable output
dashboard.module4.description: Recommendations include summary logic, KPI evidence, and risk notes suitable for thesis defense.
dashboard.sample_snapshot_subtitle: Demo values generated from the built-in example product.
dashboard.scenario_overview_subtitle: Best-result summary for each market scenario.
about.hero.title: Smarter pricing decisions, backed by profit logic.
about.hero.subtitle: PricePilot gives e-commerce teams a clear way to analyze pricing, compare strategies, and understand profitability before they change a price.
about.hero.panel.title: Built for fast pricing decisions
about.hero.panel.item1.title: Compare pricing strategies
about.hero.panel.item1.description: See how cost-plus, competitive, demand-based, inventory-based, and AI-assisted recommendations perform side by side.
about.hero.panel.item2.title: Stress-test profit outcomes
about.hero.panel.item2.description: Model demand shifts, competitor pressure, and scenario changes before rolling out a new price.
about.hero.panel.item3.title: Read decision-ready signals
about.hero.panel.item3.description: Track margins, ROI, risk, break-even levels, and operational tradeoffs in one view.
about.overview.title: PricePilot turns pricing analysis into a clearer operating decision.
about.overview.subtitle: It is designed for teams that need more confidence than a spreadsheet and more speed than a manual pricing review.
about.overview.body1: PricePilot helps e-commerce businesses evaluate how pricing choices affect demand, margin, and overall profitability.
about.overview.body2: Instead of looking at price in isolation, the platform brings together cost structure, competitor reference points, demand sensitivity, inventory pressure, and scenario context so teams can choose a pricing direction with better evidence.
about.overview.card1.title: See the full pricing picture
about.overview.card1.description: Review revenue, profit, margin, and break-even indicators together instead of checking each metric separately.
about.overview.card2.title: Compare options quickly
about.overview.card2.description: Test multiple strategies in the same workspace and identify which path creates the strongest balance of return and risk.
about.overview.card3.title: Move with more confidence
about.overview.card3.description: Use structured analysis and clear outputs to support price changes with less guesswork.
about.capabilities.title: What you can do with PricePilot
about.capabilities.subtitle: The platform is built to support day-to-day pricing work, faster scenario evaluation, and more disciplined profit decisions.
about.capabilities.item1.title: Analyze product pricing
about.capabilities.item1.description: Evaluate a product's current economics using market reference prices, demand inputs, cost assumptions, and margin targets.
about.capabilities.item2.title: Compare strategy outcomes
about.capabilities.item2.description: Review pricing models side by side to understand which strategy performs best under the same business conditions.
about.capabilities.item3.title: Understand profit impact
about.capabilities.item3.description: See how pricing changes affect revenue, contribution margin, ROI, and break-even volume before you commit.
about.capabilities.item4.title: Model market scenarios
about.capabilities.item4.description: Test pricing under lower demand, promotional periods, stronger demand windows, or normal market conditions.
about.capabilities.item5.title: Track financial indicators
about.capabilities.item5.description: Monitor the KPIs that matter most to pricing decisions, including utilization, returns, and overall risk exposure.
about.capabilities.item6.title: Make decisions faster
about.capabilities.item6.description: Turn complex pricing tradeoffs into a clear recommendation path that is easier to review and act on.
about.help.title: From raw numbers to practical pricing decisions
about.help.subtitle: PricePilot reduces the friction between analysis and action.
about.help.card.title: Built to reduce guesswork
about.help.card.paragraph1: Pricing teams rarely need more raw data. They need a faster way to understand what a pricing change is likely to do before it reaches the market.
about.help.card.paragraph2: PricePilot helps by translating pricing inputs into decision-ready signals, so teams can compare alternatives, quantify tradeoffs, and see potential profit impact before changing price points.
about.help.list.item1: Turn cost, demand, and competitor data into a structured pricing view.
about.help.list.item2: Evaluate pricing alternatives without rebuilding analysis from scratch.
about.help.list.item3: See potential profit and margin consequences before execution.
about.help.list.item4: Review downside risk alongside upside opportunity.
about.help.point1.title: Less manual analysis
about.help.point1.description: Reduce time spent stitching together spreadsheets, assumptions, and one-off calculations.
about.help.point2.title: Faster scenario review
about.help.point2.description: Move from pricing question to evaluated options in a single workflow.
about.help.point3.title: Clearer recommendations
about.help.point3.description: Give stakeholders a concise view of why one pricing direction makes more sense than another.
about.foundation.title: A product experience designed for reliable pricing work
about.foundation.subtitle: The platform combines analytical depth with a straightforward interface so pricing reviews stay focused and readable.
about.foundation.item1.label: Analytical Engine
about.foundation.item1.title: Reliable financial modeling
about.foundation.item1.description: A structured pricing engine evaluates demand response, margin quality, profitability, and risk in a consistent framework.
about.foundation.item2.label: Workspace
about.foundation.item2.title: Responsive decision workflow
about.foundation.item2.description: The interface is designed to keep inputs, outputs, and scenario comparisons easy to scan on desktop and mobile.
about.foundation.item3.label: Insights
about.foundation.item3.title: Visual reporting that stays useful
about.foundation.item3.description: Charts, KPI cards, and comparison views highlight what matters without overwhelming the pricing review.
about.closing.title: PricePilot helps teams approach pricing with more clarity, control, and confidence.
about.closing.subtitle: Better pricing decisions come from seeing tradeoffs early. PricePilot gives businesses a cleaner way to test options, understand profitability, and move forward with stronger evidence.
js.highlight_summary: {strategy} is currently the strongest overall option at {price}.
js.why_reason_score: It has the highest balanced decision score at {score}.
js.why_reason_financial: Expected profit is {profit}, with a {margin}% profit margin and {roi}% ROI.
js.why_reason_comparison: It leads {next_strategy} by {score_gap} score points in the current analysis.
js.score_breakdown_note: Score breakdown: profit {profit}, margin {margin}, ROI {roi}, risk-adjusted {risk}, stability {stability}.
explanation.title: {strategy} is the recommended pricing strategy for {product}
explanation.summary: PricePilot recommends ${price} for {product} because this option delivers the strongest balanced decision score, not only the highest raw profit. It combines ${profit} expected profit, {profit_margin}% margin, {roi}% ROI, and {risk_level} operational risk.
explanation.detail.selection: The selected strategy is {strategy} with a recommended price of ${price}. Expected revenue is ${revenue} and expected profit is ${profit}.
explanation.detail.metrics: Projected profit margin is {profit_margin}%, contribution margin is {contribution_margin}%, ROI is {roi}%, and the overall risk level is {risk_level} ({risk_score}/100).
explanation.detail.elasticity: The elasticity value of {elasticity} indicates price-sensitive demand. At the recommended price, the modeled price effect changes demand by {elasticity_effect}% relative to the blended market reference.
explanation.detail.scenario: The {scenario} scenario adjusts baseline demand to {adjusted_demand} units, competitor reference price to ${competitor_price}, unit cost to ${adjusted_unit_cost}, and return rate to {adjusted_return_rate}%.
explanation.detail.preference: This option ranks ahead of {next_best_strategy} by {score_gap} score points. It changes expected profit by ${profit_gap} and risk by {risk_gap} points versus the next-best strategy.
explanation.detail.stability: Across all scenarios, the same price yields mean profit of ${mean_profit} with a profit standard deviation of ${profit_std_dev}. This gives a stability score of {stability_score}.
explanation.detail.break_even.none: Break-even is not reached because the recommended price does not fully cover variable cost.
explanation.detail.break_even.inside: Break-even is estimated at {break_even_units} units, which remains inside the current inventory level of {inventory}.
explanation.detail.break_even.outside: Break-even is estimated at {break_even_units} units, which exceeds the current inventory level of {inventory} and increases execution risk.
explanation.caution.medium: The recommendation still carries medium risk and should be monitored during execution.
explanation.caution.high: The recommendation carries high risk and should be used carefully with closer managerial control.
